name: aipg-video-pipeline
description: Unified Remotion video pipeline for dental marketing — Vercel Sandbox rendering

scripts.bundle: bunx remotion bundle src/index.ts && bun run bundle:sync
scripts.bundle:sync: rm -rf public/bundle && cp -r build public/bundle && find public/bundle/public -name '*.mp4' -delete 2>/dev/null; rm -rf public/bundle/public/bundle 2>/dev/null; find public/bundle -name '*.map' -delete 2>/dev/null; echo 'Bundle ready:'&& du -sh public/bundle
